title: Decode Duplication Trace Semantics Split / Generated Repeat Attribution Seal

fields.prefix_push_duplication_detected: bool: true only when last_token push really occurred and prefix_len_delta > 0
fields.prefix_push_duplication_count: usize: count of push-caused duplicate tail observations
fields.generated_history_repeat_detected: bool: true when generated sequence itself already contains consecutive last-token repeats
fields.generated_history_repeat_count: usize: count of generated-history repeat observations
fields.recommended_next_patch: QW-50-R0W-B only for push duplication; QW-50-R0X-A for generated repeat observation
